summary: Guided Booking Flow + Stripe Integration fully tested. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend booking flow completed: WELCOME -> DATES -> GUESTS -> ROOMS -> SERVICES -> SUMMARY -> PAYMENT. All UI elements working correctly. Stripe checkout creates valid checkout URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking flow fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/booking/services (returns 6 services), POST /api/booking/rooms/available (room availability with date validation), POST /api/booking/summary (price breakdown with 10% tax), POST /api/booking/checkout (creates Stripe checkout - working with test key sk_test_emergent), GET /api/booking/status/{booking_id}, POST /api/booking/webhook. Frontend flow: Book a Room button, DatePicker (check-in/check-out), GuestPicker (+/-), RoomSelector (5 room types with prices/capacity/description), ServiceSelector (6 services), BookingSummary (breakdown + guest info form + Proceed to Payment button). Room prices verified: Standard $180, Deluxe $260, Ocean View $320, Suite $420, Penthouse $780.

features_verified.GET /api/booking/services: PASS - Returns 6 services with correct prices
features_verified.POST /api/booking/rooms/available: PASS - Returns rooms filtered by date/capacity
features_verified.POST /api/booking/summary: PASS - Returns correct price breakdown with 10% tax
features_verified.POST /api/booking/checkout: PASS - Creates Stripe checkout session with valid URL
features_verified.POST /api/booking/webhook: PASS - Endpoint exists and accepts POST
